perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a black safety net on a trampoline inside a warehouse store, featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and large yellow-and-red text. (2) The camera pans across the trampoline, showing a yellow ball inside, then cuts to a close-up of a price tag displaying '$34,999' for a Springfree 10ft trampoline. (3) A female character in a black dress and white shirt walks alongside the trampoline to demonstrate its immense size, gesturing with her hands. (4) A close-up shot shows a hand pulling the heavy-duty zipper of the trampoline's mesh enclosure. (5) The female character stands in a Costco aisle lined with various toy boxes, talking directly to the camera with a cheerful and playful expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic guitar and keyboard music begins. A young female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin Chinese. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect plays as the price text appears. (3) The music continues at a steady volume as the female narrator describes the features of the trampoline. (4) Faint ambient sounds of a warehouse environment, including distant chatter and cart movements, are mixed with the music. (5) The female voice shifts to a more whining, playful tone as she expresses a desire to go inside the trampoline.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Huge Trampoline' in large yellow characters with red outlines. (2) Functional Text: '34,999' indicating the price. (3) Functional Text: '10-foot jumping trampoline' and 'comes with basketball hoop' describing product specs. (4) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout translating the spoken dialogue. (5) Decorative Text: 'I really want to go in' in pink and blue stylized text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Product close-up -> Feature/Price reveal -> Scale demonstration -> Personal reaction

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male staff/shopper in background, 1 shopper pushing a cart, 1 child visible in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a black sleeveless midi-dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse interior featuring high ceilings, industrial shelving, signage for 'Fresh Produce' and 'Pastries', and aisles filled with bulk-packaged goods and toys.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lighthearted lifestyle vlog intended to showcase an impressively large and expensive product (a Springfree trampoline) found at a Costco warehouse. It aims to entertain viewers by highlighting the contrast between the trampoline's scale/price and the creator's personal space constraints, fostering engagement through shared shopping experiences.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently displays the Costco logo and focuses specifically on one brand of trampoline (Springfree) with pricing details.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration with colorful, variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes classic influencer editing techniques like fast cuts and text stickers to maintain high engagement for a short-form mobile audience.
